overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence from a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a player character walking through a shallow stream beneath a large wooden railway trestle in a mountainous forest. A steam locomotive passes overhead as the character emerges from under the bridge and continues through the water before climbing into an open grassy meadow with distant mountain views.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath wooden railway trestle

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through shallow stream water under the dark wooden bridge structure

entered.detail: large dark timber railway bridge structure overhead with cross-bracing
shallow flowing creek with visible current and rocks beneath surface
boulders lining the stream banks under the bridge
dense pine trees visible through the bridge exit in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit, enclosed space beneath a massive wooden railway trestle. The camera moves forward through shallow stream water, surrounded by large rocks and timber bridge supports, looking toward the bright forest exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest stream with grassy banks

events.description: exits the covered bridge structure into bright open sunlight and sky
steam locomotive becomes visible approaching on the trestle bridge overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the stream bed while looking up toward the approaching train on the bridge

entered.detail: green grassy slope rising from the stream edge
tall pine trees lining the stream banks

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the bridge into open daylight, the scene reveals a flowing stream surrounded by grassy banks and pine forest. The camera continues forward through the water as a steam train becomes visible approaching on the bridge structure now to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway trestle with steam train passing overhead

events.description: steam locomotive passes directly overhead emitting thick black smoke
freight cars continue crossing the bridge from left to right

agents.ego_description: standing in the stream looking up at the train passing overhead on the wooden trestle

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive with freight cars moving across the trestle bridge emitting dark smoke

entered.detail: red and black steam locomotive with boxcars moving on the bridge above
thick black smoke billowing from the locomotive stack against the sky

segments.scene_description: A steam train passes directly overhead on the wooden trestle bridge, filling the sky with black smoke. The camera remains in the stream below, looking up at the locomotive and freight cars moving from left to right across the bridge span.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed with railway trestle receding

events.description: camera turns to look back at the train and bridge from downstream

agents.ego_description: walking along the stream bed while looking back at the departing train and bridge structure

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders in the stream bed

segments.scene_description: After the train passes, the camera continues downstream through the rocky stream bed, looking back at the wooden trestle bridge now receding into the distance. Large boulders emerge from the water as the bridge structure becomes smaller on the left horizon.

events.description: ascends from stream bed onto grassy bank leaving the water
distant snow-capped mountain peaks become visible through the trees

agents.ego_description: climbing up the grassy slope away from the stream into open meadow with tall grass

entered.detail: tall green grass and wildflowers covering the sloping hillside
distant mountain peaks visible through the haze beyond the forest

segments.scene_description: Leaving the stream behind, the camera ascends a grassy slope into an open meadow with tall wild grasses. The wooden bridge and stream recede from view as the scene opens up to reveal a vast forested valley with distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim shadows beneath a railway trestle into a vast, sunlit mountain meadow. It begins in the enclosed space under massive wooden supports, moving through a shallow stream toward a bright forest exit. As the camera emerges into the open daylight, the scene expands to reveal a flowing stream and pine forest just as a steam train appears on the bridge to the left. The perspective then shifts upward as the locomotive passes directly overhead, filling the sky with black smoke before the camera continues downstream past large boulders while the bridge recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera ascends a grassy slope, leaving the water behind to reveal a wide forested valley and distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky.
